title: heracleum stenophyllum subsp. angustatum
intro: Heracleum stenophyllum subsp. angustatum, also known as the narrow-leafed cow parsley, is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae) characterized by its slender stems and divided leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, allowing it to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Heracleum stenophyllum subsp. angustatum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies for their therapeutic properties.
